description: As a gene therapy researcher, use UGENE to locate the Inverted Terminal Repeats (ITRs) in the AAV2 reference genome (~/UGENE_Data/gene_therapy/aav2_genome.fasta). Identify inverted repeats using a window size of 50, minimum identity of 85%, and the disjoint repeats nested filter algorithm. Export the annotated sequence to ~/UGENE_Data/gene_therapy/results/aav2_annotated.gb. Create a report at ~/UGENE_Data/gene_therapy/results/itr_report.txt including the total genome length, the number of inverted repeats found, and the start and end coordinates for both the 5' and 3' ITRs.

metadata.data_source: NCBI Reference Sequence: NC_001401.2 (Adeno-associated virus - 2, complete genome)
